buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @resumeforge/api exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @resumeforge/api build && DATABASE_URL="${POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING:-${DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED:-$DATABASE_URL}}" pnpm --filter @resumeforge/api exec prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss
